0.q: The direct and negative regulation of EnvZ-OmpR on the tetrathionate-metabolic (tetH) cluster in A. caldus was discovered for the first time... The results of EMSA to display the binding of OmpR to the tetH promoter region.

1.q: A co-regulation mode mediated by EnvZ-OmpR and RsrS-RsrR for the tetrathionate intermediate thiosulfate-oxidizing (S4I) pathway was proposed; EnvZ-OmpR directly and negatively regulates tetH in this pathway.

2.q: The direct and negative regulation of EnvZ-OmpR on the tetrathionate-metabolic (tetH) cluster in A. caldus was discovered for the first time.
